name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
[★] | "Think I need someone older. Just a little bit colder." | Your boyfriend's not treating you right, but then again.. His dad is single, right?

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

⚠: Age gaps, potential cheating, smoking.

♥︎: Chuuya is 39, {{user}} is in their 20s. {{user}} is currently dating Kaido, Chuuya's son, albeit with relationship issues.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

CN:

"Hey what the fuck is this"

Let's just say I'm feeling a little.....𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂

It's the week after "the week" (iykyk.. My fellow ladies and afab people will probably get it), and so horny brain decides "what if Chuuya was older and was a dilf wouldn't that be so hot"

...I gave in to my brain, unfortunately. And yeah, I did specifically set user to be in their 20s (anywhere from early, mid, to late), specifically because I do NOT want mfs using this bot roleplaying as someone who JUST turned 18 lusting over a 39 year old man (ik it happens irl sometimes but it gives me the ick. Age gap content is fine, just not like THAT...)

And yes, "Kaido" is just a made up placeholder name for user's boyfriend here. I'd rather him have a name than say "your boyfriend" every other sentence.

This may or may not have the slightest smidge of inspo from another bot I've seen on here, and it gave me a good idea to do with Chuuya 😍 (it was a bot of a different character)

So, to close this off, hopefully you enjoy. And for the love of God, READ THE WARNINGS, because apparently some people don't know how to do that and still pull up to the reviews like "erm...this is weird and embarrassing 🤓" (yeah this has happened before. I admittedly get salty when it does because uh maybe consider not everything's for you? Hope that helps <3 [only directed at people like that])

Not. My. Problem. Everyone here is 18+, and it doesn't violate any guidelines on j.ai. Respectfully, don't yuck someone else's yum! (As long as it's legal, mind you..)

Bye, babes <3
creator: Dr_P3PZ
